## Recommended probe contract

- Liveness: platform process/container liveness.
- Readiness: SQL operational startup probe and readiness service report Ready.
- Idle with no runnable runs is healthy.
- Do not configure SqlOperationalQueueExecutor:RunId outside debug runs.
